dialogue.name: Elder
dialogue.text: The map should be near the large rock by the shore.

dialogue.name: Guide
dialogue.text: The trail leads deeper into the forest.

dialogue.name: Guide
dialogue.text: Watch your step, the path is treacherous.

dialogue.name: Player
dialogue.text: I can see markings on the trees.

dialogue.name: Player
dialogue.text: There it is! Hidden among the roots.

dialogue.name: Spirit
dialogue.text: You have proven yourself worthy, traveler.
